evidence.claim: Built computer vision models for image moderation using PyTorch and fine-tuned ResNet variants
evidence.source_text: Built computer vision models for our product's image moderation feature using PyTorch — fine-tuned ResNet variants on a labeled dataset of ~200K images.

evidence.claim: Fine-tuned ResNet models on a dataset of approximately 200,000 images
evidence.source_text: fine-tuned ResNet variants on a labeled dataset of ~200K images.

evidence.claim: Developed customer-facing predictive models for churn, conversion, and lifetime value
evidence.source_text: Worked on customer-facing predictive modeling for an e-commerce platform — churn prediction, conversion likelihood, lifetime value estimation.

evidence.claim: Used scikit-learn and XGBoost with ~80 hand-engineered features for predictive modeling
evidence.source_text: Used scikit-learn and XGBoost; main models were gradient-boosted trees with ~80 hand-engineered features.

evidence.claim: Churn model successfully deployed and used by the retention team
evidence.source_text: The churn model is now used by the retention team

evidence.claim: Self-aware regarding current skill gaps in engineering/infra and desire to pivot to LLMs
evidence.source_text: I'm still building depth on the engineering and infra side of production ML. I want to grow into senior AI engineering — get serious about LLMs and retrieval beyond the surface level.

evidence.claim: Proficient in various ML and MLOps tools including YOLO, TensorFlow, MLflow, pgvector, and QLoRA
evidence.source_text: Skills: YOLO (advanced), TensorFlow (intermediate), MLflow (advanced), pgvector (advanced), QLoRA (advanced)
